TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_lapic, title = lapic, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/lapic} }

S.FORM: lapic, lawal u lapical ku saasu'ay a satitian.
S.PHON: r~ɾapiʦ, r~ɾawar~ɾ u r~ɾapiʦar~ɾ ku saasuʔ~ʡaj a satitian.
S.FORM: lapic, lawal u lapical ku saasu'ay a satitian.
S.PHON: r~ɾapiʦ, r~ɾawar~ɾ u r~ɾapiʦar~ɾ ku saasuʔ~ʡaj a satitian.
